AppointmentReason.title: AppointmentReason
AppointmentReason.description: It store what appointment is for or what is the purpose of appointment.

CustomerName.title: CustomerName
CustomerName.description: Stores the customer's name in the required format. The name uses proper capitalization, where each word starts with a capital letter and the remaining letters are lowercase (for example: "Yash Agarwal").

DoctorName.title: DoctorName
DoctorName.description: Stores the doctor’s name in the required format. The name must begin with "Dr." and use proper capitalization, where each word starts with a capital letter and the remaining letters are lowercase (for example: "Dr. Mohan Prakash").

HospitalName.title: HospitalName
HospitalName.description: Stores the hospital's name in the required format. The name uses proper capitalization, where each word starts with a capital letter and the remaining letters are lowercase (for example: "Care Hospital").

ScheduleDateTime.title: ScheduleDateTime
ScheduleDateTime.description: Stores the appointment schedule date and time.
